description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a gray gable roof and a prominent attached garage at the front. The facade features large rectangular windows, a paved driveway, and a small landscaped front yard with a tree and shrubs. The property extends to the rear with a spacious backyard, including a green lawn, patio furniture, and a detached outbuilding or guest house. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding with some wood accents, and the overall layout is elongated, maximizing the lot's depth. The house is surrounded by a low white fence, and the backyard includes additional amenities such as a pool and a deck area. The architectural style is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on functional outdoor spaces and open sightlines.
description: A modern two-story house with a gray gable roof, attached garage, landscaped front yard, and an extended backyard featuring a lawn, pool, and detached outbuilding. The design is contemporary with large windows and clean lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, backyard lawn, pool, and detached outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio furniture, detached outbuilding, and white perimeter fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard amenities, side of the main house, and the driveway area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a covered porch adjacent to the garage
